title: ipomoea involucrata
intro: Ipomoea involucrata, also known as the Purpleback Morning Glory or Purpleback Ipomoea, is a flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant's health benefits include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as aiding in the relief of coughs and sore throats. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea involucrata include infusions and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, syrups, or added to topical creams for its medicinal benefits.
